session_display_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_display_config_t(3)

NAME

session_display_config_t - Configuration for session display context.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/display.h>

Data Fields


bool snapshot_mode
Enable snapshot mode (single frame capture). palette_type_t palette_type
Palette type for ASCII rendering. const char * custom_palette
Custom palette characters (required if palette_type == PALETTE_CUSTOM). terminal_color_mode_t color_mode
Color mode override (TERM_COLOR_AUTO for auto-detection). bool enable_audio_playback
Enable audio playback (mirror mode). void * audio_ctx
Audio context for playback (borrowed, not owned). session_display_should_exit_fn should_exit_callback
Optional: callback to check if initialization should be cancelled (e.g., shutdown signal). void * callback_data
Opaque data passed to should_exit_callback. uint32_t render_fps
Video FPS for render-file encoding (0 = use default/option). void * render_file_audio_source
Audio source for render-file output (media source for file/URL audio, borrowed). void * render_file_audio_capture_rb
Audio capture ring buffer for render-file output (live mic, borrowed).

Detailed Description

Configuration for session display context.

Specifies display parameters including snapshot mode, palette, and color mode.

Definition at line 75 of file src/common/session/display.h.
